headline: FIFA World Cup Ticketing Process Investigated by NY, NJ
summary: (Bloomberg) -- New York and New Jersey are investigating the process used by FIFA to sell tickets to World Cup soccer games set to start next month, after some buyers complained they didn’t get the seats they paid for.Most Read from BloombergIran’s Khamenei Says No Going Back for Middle East Rocked by WarSingapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail TermPutin Signs Law on Use of Army to Aid Russians Detained AbroadRussia Tells US to Evacuate Its Diplomats and Citizens From KyivEx-President
